mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS userCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review) AS reviewCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment) AS commentCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM watchlist) AS watchCnt
SELECT user_no, user_id, user_name, user_email, user_role, user_img, join_date FROM users ORDER BY join_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_role = #{userRole} WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.content AS content, r.rating AS rating, r.spoiler AS spoiler, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.reg_date AS regDate, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_no AS userNo, m.title AS movieTitle, m.tmdb_id AS tmdbId FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_no = u.user_no JOIN movie m ON r.movie_no = m.movie_no ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
